audit: VLM calibration and S11 generation-settings contract
contract_changes: calibration and production S11 use the same governed generation options
generation options are included in the production-gate fingerprint
any generation-options change invalidates the gate
invalid-JSON retry preserves the exact same generation options
whole-image P-IMAGE review uses the same options

live_repeat_diagnostic.interpretation: Ollama varied evidence wording, so the gate scores normalized verdicts and does not claim byte-identical free text

candidate_prompt_decision.reason: small deprecated diagnostic was mixed: it increased defect sensitivity but also failed a good case and still missed the loose-boundary case; authoritative gold calibration is required
